description.p: Naia OS is a desktop AI companion application. It features a 3D VRM avatar powered by Three.js and integrates with multiple LLM providers for natural conversation.

Connect your own API keys for Google Gemini, xAI Grok, or Anthropic Claude to chat with your personal AI avatar. Naia can execute tools, browse the web, manage files, and interact with Discord — all from a sandboxed desktop shell.
NVIDIA GPU support, GNOME 50 runtime, and CI pipeline overhaul.

ul.li: OS base image switched to bazzite-nvidia-open (RTX GPU out of the box)
GNOME Platform/Sdk runtime upgraded from 49 to 50
Full CI green: all lint, type-check, and test failures resolved
Windows and Flatpak release pipeline fixes

description.p: Browser panel embedding, workspace panel, and Discord relay.

ul.li: Browser panel: Chrome embedding via X11 reparenting
Workspace panel: file tree, editor, session dashboard
Discord relay polling with linked channels sync

description.p: Voice conversation, TTS unification, and credential storage improvements.

ul.li: Real-time voice conversation via Gemini Live API
Unified voice setting: same Chirp 3 HD voice for live conversation and TTS
TTS works independently of LLM provider selection
Credential storage with Tauri secure store (encrypted persistence)
Bug fixes: multi-turn voice sessions, AudioContext resume, Rust warning cleanup
3D VRM avatar with lip-sync and animations
Built-in tools: web search, file manager, Discord integration
Always-on agent daemon with skill system
